[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Vulpus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|CIS Officer]] who served the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he was sent by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] to observe [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] experiments in turning [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] into [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Cybernetics/Legends|cyborg warriors]]. He flew a [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|''Ginivex''-class starfighter]] to Grievous's base on [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]] and expressed interest in the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] general's activities, even offering to assist Grievous in turning the younglings into cyborgs.

When the younglings escaped with the assistance of rebel [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]], Vulpus insisted on contacting Dooku immediately, and took offense to Grievous's threats, even standing up to the cyborg general's bandished [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] without flinching. He informed the angry general that killing him would bring down Dooku's wrath upon Grievous's head.

==Appearances==
*[[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]] {{1st}}
